description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Release that triggers on published releases, a scheduled cron job, and workflow dispatch. The workflow has three jobs: update-autorevision, update-archive, and i686-windows. The update-autorevision job updates AutoRevision.txt and creates a pull request. The update-archive job creates a source archive and uploads it. The i686-windows job creates a Windows package for i686 architecture and uploads it.
